current_support_limitation: Analytic iso-cost surfaces for L2 / plane-plus-axis / factorial penalties; illustrative, not an experiment output

Localized oriented dictionary atoms; diagonal model also yields Gabor-like atoms, so not unique to group learning
32 of 256 groups selected; grouping appears structured but selection/confirmation bias untested; no null comparison

Wiring cost flattens near dimension two; no repeated starts, uncertainty, or null-graph curves

Symmetric near-diagonal + antisymmetric off-diagonal structure; larger periodic A magnitude does NOT imply deeper basin

Velocity input translates place bump and advances ring phase; no path-integration error curve

Core notation table; not an experiment output; needs stable ID and provenance but not regeneration

Evidence-calibrated comparison of the two studies; conceptual synthesis table
Attractor training configuration record; must be regenerated from frozen configs once code exists

van Hateren identifiers + preprocessing pipeline; grayscale, to be replaced by public color data cards; boundary/precision unspecified
Attractor training details; several noise-scaling/decoder conventions unresolved and flagged for definition
C1: group-structure learning formulated as differentiation of a denoising objective through finite sparse inference
C2: learned overlapping groups capture position/orientation/scale dependencies with modest denoising advantage in tested setup
C3: recurrent location memory with restoration + velocity transport trainable under injected state/weight perturbations for prescribed 1D codes
C4: conditional place-only vs mixed place-periodic comparison; finer fixed-point spacing in selected mixed example; controls still required
Central thesis: corruption-restoration objective reveals dependencies and can train restoring dynamics; transport is a separate operation from restoration
Gabor Gaussian envelope requires negative quadratic exponent; corrected from 2016 form that grew away from center
Group-penalty derivative is a signed gradient, not a nonnegative adaptive soft threshold; legacy vs corrected inference variants needed
1/2 factor from differentiating the square root belongs in the equality; absorbable only into a proportional learning rate
First-order update uses Delta t/tau, not absolute t; noise-scaling convention with Delta t/tau unresolved and flagged
Antisymmetric transport component does not define/deepen a scalar energy; use fixed-point/basin language; robustness must be measured not inferred from weight magnitude
Multi-module 1D and 2D toroidal grid + path integration proposed but not implemented; stated as future work
Public color-image study with separate whitened representation and RGB denoising tracks proposed; not in 2026 edition
Quantitative multi-seed group recovery on synthetic data with permutation-invariant metric proposed
Budget-matched place-vs-grid comparison (activity, weight norm, decoder, compute, selection split) proposed; core to a valid C4 claim
